summary: Iteration 30 - Testing Bible toolbar bookmark button fix and mood-checkin API. Backend API WORKING - mood-checkin returns different verses on consecutive calls (verified with 5 API calls - 4 unique verses). CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG PERSISTS: Bookmark button in Bible reading toolbar STILL NOT RENDERING despite code existing at lines 698-704. Only 3 buttons visible (Edizioni, A16, Aiuto) instead of 4.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Bookmark button (my-content-btn) is STILL NOT rendering. Code exists at lines 698-704 in bible.tsx but UI shows only 3 buttons: Edizioni, A16, Aiuto. The data-testid attribute is also not being rendered at all (empty array when querying page).
ui_bugs.expected: 4 toolbar buttons: [bookmark icon], Edizioni, A16, Aiuto
ui_bugs.actual: 3 toolbar buttons: Edizioni, A16, Aiuto - bookmark button completely missing from DOM
ui_bugs.code_snippet: TouchableOpacity with Icon name='bookmark' should render as first button in readingToolbar

action_items: CRITICAL: Investigate why TouchableOpacity at lines 698-704 is not rendering - may be conditional render issue or JSX syntax problem
Check if Icon component 'bookmark' name is valid - other icons (swap-horizontal, text, help-circle) render correctly
Verify no whitespace or invisible character issues in JSX between toolbar View and first TouchableOpacity
Try wrapping bookmark button in a View or adding explicit key prop
Check React Native Web compatibility for data-testid - currently no data-testid attributes render at all
critical_code_review_comments: The TouchableOpacity for bookmark button (lines 698-704) is syntactically correct but not rendering
data-testid='my-content-btn' is not being applied to any element - React Native Web may need testID instead of data-testid
All other toolbar buttons in the same View container render correctly
Icon name='bookmark' may have an issue - try 'bookmark-outline' or verify ionicons support

success_rate.backend: 100% - mood-checkin API verified working with different verses on each call
success_rate.frontend: PARTIAL - Emoji mood selector works and shows different verses; Bible bookmark button NOT rendering

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend mood-checkin API verified working - 5 consecutive calls returned 4 unique verses (random.choice working). Frontend emoji mood selector successfully shows different verses on each tap. CRITICAL BUG: Bible reading toolbar bookmark button (lines 698-704 in bible.tsx) is NOT RENDERING despite code existing. Only 3 buttons visible instead of 4. No data-testid attributes render on the page at all.

mood_checkin_api.test_results: 5 consecutive calls with 'felice' mood returned: Romani 15:13, Neemia 8:10, Salmi 16:11, Neemia 8:10, Salmi 126:3 (4 unique verses)

emoji_mood_frontend.notes: Clicking emoji buttons on home page triggers mood-checkin API and displays different verses with AI reflection

bible_toolbar_bookmark_button.issue: Button NOT rendering - code exists at lines 698-704 but does not appear in DOM

rca_of_issue: The bookmark TouchableOpacity at lines 698-704 in bible.tsx is not rendering in the browser. Possible causes: 1) Icon component issue with 'bookmark' name, 2) React Native Web rendering issue, 3) JSX whitespace/syntax issue, 4) CSS causing element to be hidden. The other 3 toolbar buttons (Edizioni, A16, Aiuto) in the same View container render correctly. Additionally, data-testid attributes are not being applied at all - may need to use testID for React Native Web compatibility.
